query: (cat:cs.CV OR cat:eess.IV OR cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.LG OR cat:cs.MM OR cat:stat.ML) AND submittedDate:[202603150000 TO 202603152359]

papers.title: AerialVLA: A Vision-Language-Action Model for UAV Navigation via Minimalist End-to-End Control
papers.summary: Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) demands complex visual interpretation and continuous control in dynamic 3D environments. Existing hierarchical approaches rely on dense oracle guidance or auxiliary object detectors, creating semantic gaps and limiting genuine autonomy. We propose AerialVLA, a minimalist end-to-end Vision-Language-Action framework mapping raw visual observations and fuzzy linguistic instructions directly to continuous physical control signals. First, we introduce a streamlined dual-view perception strategy that reduces visual redundancy while preserving essential cues for forward navigation and precise grounding, which additionally facilitates future simulation-to-reality transfer. To reclaim genuine autonomy, we deploy a fuzzy directional prompting mechanism derived solely from onboard sensors, completely eliminating the dependency on dense oracle guidance. Ultimately, we formulate a unified control space that integrates continuous 3-Degree-of-Freedom (3-DoF) kinematic commands with an intrinsic landing signal, freeing the agent from external object detectors for precision landing. Extensive experiments on the TravelUAV benchmark demonstrate that AerialVLA achieves state-of-the-art performance in seen environments. Furthermore, it exhibits superior generalization in unseen scenarios by achieving nearly three times the success rate of leading baselines, validating that a minimalist, autonomy-centric paradigm captures more robust visual-motor representations than complex modular systems.
papers.comment: 18 pages, 4 figures. Code and demo videos will be available at: https://github.com/XuPeng23/AerialVLA
papers.title_zh: AerialVLA：通过极简端对端控制实现无人机导航的视觉-语言-动作模型
papers.summary_zh: 无人机 (UAV) 的视觉语言导航 (VLN) 需要在动态 3D 环境中进行复杂的视觉解释和连续控制。现有的分层方法依赖于密集的预言机指导或辅助对象检测器，造成语义差距并限制真正的自主性。我们提出了 AerialVLA，这是一种极简的端到端视觉-语言-动作框架，将原始视觉观察和模糊语言指令直接映射到连续的物理控制信号。首先，我们引入了一种简化的双视图感知策略，可以减少视觉冗余，同时保留前向导航和精确接地的基本线索，这还有助于未来的模拟到现实的转换。为了重新获得真正的自主权，我们部署了一种仅源自机载传感器的模糊方向提示机制，完全消除了对密集预言机指导的依赖。最终，我们制定了一个统一的控制空间，将连续的三自由度（3-DoF）运动学命令与固有的着陆信号集成在一起，使代理摆脱外部物体探测器的影响，实现精确着陆。 TravelUAV 基准测试的大量实验表明，AerialVLA 在可见环境中实现了最先进的性能。此外，它在未见过的场景中表现出卓越的泛化能力，成功率是领先基线的近三倍，验证了以自主为中心的极简范式比复杂的模块化系统捕获了更强大的视觉运动表征。

papers.title: Flood Risk Follows Valleys, Not Grids: Graph Neural Networks for Flash Flood Susceptibility Mapping in Himachal Pradesh with Conformal Uncertainty Quantification
papers.summary: Flash floods are the most destructive natural hazard in Himachal Pradesh (HP), India, causing over 400 fatalities and $1.2 billion in losses in the 2023 monsoon season alone. Existing risk maps treat every pixel independently, ignoring the basic fact that flooding upstream raises risk downstream. We address this with a Graph Neural Network (GraphSAGE) trained on a watershed connectivity graph (460 sub-watersheds, 1,700 directed edges), built from a six-year Sentinel-1 SAR flood inventory (2018-2023, 3,000 events) and 12 environmental variables at 30 m resolution. Four pixel-based ML models (RF, XGBoost, LightGBM, stacking ensemble) serve as baselines. All models are evaluated with leave-one-basin-out spatial cross-validation to avoid the 5-15% AUC inflation of random splits. Conformal prediction produces the first HP susceptibility maps with statistically guaranteed 90% coverage intervals. The GNN achieved AUC = 0.978 +/- 0.017, outperforming the best baseline (AUC = 0.881) and the published HP benchmark (AUC = 0.88). The +0.097 gain confirms that river connectivity carries predictive signal that pixel-based models miss. High-susceptibility zones overlap 1,457 km of highways (including 217 km of the Manali-Leh corridor), 2,759 bridges, and 4 major hydroelectric installations. Conformal intervals achieved 82.9% empirical coverage on the held-out 2023 test set; lower coverage in high-risk zones (45-59%) points to SAR label noise as a target for future work.
papers.comment: 28 pages, 10 figures, 2 tables. Code and data at https://github.com/Parassharmaa/flash-flood-zones-hp
papers.title_zh: 洪水风险遵循山谷，而不是网格：利用共形不确定性量化绘制喜马偕尔邦山洪暴发敏感性图神经网络
papers.summary_zh: 山洪暴发是印度喜马偕尔邦 (HP) 最具破坏性的自然灾害，仅在 2023 年季风季节就造成 400 多人死亡和 12 亿美元的损失。现有的风险地图独立处理每个像素，忽略了上游洪水增加下游风险的基本事实。我们使用图神经网络 (GraphSAGE) 来解决这个问题，该网络在流域连接图（460 个子流域、1,700 个有向边）上进行训练，该图是根据六年 Sentinel-1 SAR 洪水清单（2018-2023 年，3,000 个事件）和 30 m 分辨率的 12 个环境变量构建的。四个基于像素的 ML 模型（RF、XGBoost、LightGBM、堆叠集成）作为基线。所有模型均通过留一盆地空间​​交叉验证进行评估，以避免随机分割的 5-15% AUC 膨胀。保形预测生成第一个 HP 磁敏度图，具有统计上保证的 90% 覆盖区间。 GNN 的 AUC = 0.978 +/- 0.017，优于最佳基线 (AUC = 0.881) 和已发布的 HP 基准 (AUC = 0.88)。 +0.097 的增益证实河流连通性携带基于像素的模型错过的预测信号。高敏感区覆盖了 1,457 公里的高速公路（包括 217 公里的马纳利-列城走廊）、2,759 座桥梁和 4 个主要水力发电设施。保形区间在 2023 年测试集上实现了 82.9% 的经验覆盖率；高风险区域的覆盖率较低（45-59%），这表明 SAR 标签噪声是未来工作的目标。

papers.title: Seeing Where to Deploy: Metric RGB-Based Traversability Analysis for Aerial-to-Ground Hidden Space Inspection
papers.summary: Inspection of confined infrastructure such as culverts often requires accessing hidden spaces whose entrances are reachable primarily from elevated viewpoints. Aerial-ground cooperation enables a UAV to deploy a compact UGV for interior exploration, but selecting a suitable deployment region from aerial observations requires metric terrain reasoning involving scale ambiguity, reconstruction uncertainty, and terrain semantics. We present a metric RGB-based geometric-semantic reconstruction and traversability analysis framework for aerial-to-ground hidden space inspection. A feed-forward multi-view RGB reconstruction backbone produces dense geometry, while temporally consistent semantic segmentation yields a 3D semantic map. To enable deployment-relevant measurements without LiDAR-based dense mapping, we introduce an embodied motion prior that recovers metric scale by enforcing consistency between predicted camera motion and onboard platform egomotion. From the metrically grounded reconstruction, we construct a confidence-aware geometric-semantic traversability map and evaluate candidate deployment zones under explicit reachability constraints. Experiments on a tethered UAV-UGV platform demonstrate reliable deployment-zone identification in hidden space scenarios.
papers.title_zh: 查看部署位置：基于公制 RGB 的可穿越性分析，用于空对地隐藏空间检查
papers.summary_zh: 对涵洞等有限基础设施的检查通常需要进入隐藏的空间，这些空间的入口主要从高处的视角到达。空地协作使无人机能够部署紧凑型无人地面飞行器进行内部探索，但从空中观测中选择合适的部署区域需要度量地形推理，涉及尺度模糊性、重建不确定性和地形语义。我们提出了一种基于度量 RGB 的几何语义重建和可遍历性分析框架，用于空对地隐藏空间检查。前馈多视图 RGB 重建骨干网产生密集的几何图形，而时间一致的语义分割则产生 3D 语义图。为了在没有基于 LiDAR 的密集映射的情况下实现与部署相关的测量，我们引入了一种体现运动先验，通过强制预测的相机运动和板载平台自我运动之间的一致性来恢复度量尺度。根据基于度量的重建，我们构建了一个置信感知的几何语义可遍历性图，并在明确的可达性约束下评估候选部署区域。系留 UAV-UGV 平台上的实验证明了隐藏空间场景中可靠的部署区域识别。

papers.title: GroundSet: A Cadastral-Grounded Dataset for Spatial Understanding with Vector Data
papers.summary: Precise spatial understanding in Earth Observation is essential for translating raw aerial imagery into actionable insights for critical applications like urban planning, environmental monitoring and disaster management. However, Multimodal Large Language Models exhibit critical deficiencies in fine-grained spatial understanding within Remote Sensing, primarily due to a reliance on limited or repurposed legacy datasets. To bridge this gap, we introduce a large-scale dataset grounded in verifiable cadastral vector data, comprising 3.8 million annotated objects across 510k high-resolution images with 135 granular semantic categories. We validate this resource through a comprehensive instruction-tuning benchmark spanning seven spatial reasoning tasks. Our evaluation establishes a robust baseline using a standard LLaVA architecture. We show that while current RS-specialized and commercial models (e.g., Gemini) struggle in zero-shot settings, high-fidelity supervision effectively bridges this gap, enabling standard architectures to master fine-grained spatial grounding without complex architectural modifications.
papers.title_zh: GroundSet：用于利用矢量数据进行空间理解的地籍数据集
papers.summary_zh: 地球观测中精确的空间理解对于将原始航空图像转化为城市规划、环境监测和灾害管理等关键应用的可操作见解至关重要。然而，多模态大语言模型在遥感中的细粒度空间理解方面表现出严重缺陷，这主要是由于对有限或重新利用的遗留数据集的依赖。为了弥补这一差距，我们引入了一个基于可验证地籍矢量数据的大规模数据集，其中包含 51 万张高分辨率图像中的 380 万个带注释的对象，具有 135 个粒度语义类别。我们通过涵盖七个空间推理任务的综合指令调整基准来验证该资源。我们的评估使用标准 LLaVA 架构建立了可靠的基线。我们表明，虽然当前的 RS 专用模型和商业模型（例如 Gemini）在零样本设置中举步维艰，但高保真监督有效地弥补了这一差距，使标准架构能够掌握细粒度的空间基础，而无需进行复杂的架构修改。

papers.title: AgroNVILA: Perception-Reasoning Decoupling for Multi-view Agricultural Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.summary: Agricultural multimodal reasoning requires robust spatial understanding across varying scales, from ground-level close-ups to top-down UAV and satellite imagery. Existing Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) suffer from a significant "terrestrial-centric" bias, causing scale confusion and logic drift during complex agricultural planning. To address this, we introduce the first large-scale AgroOmni (288K), a multi-view training corpus designed to capture diverse spatial topologies and scales in modern precision agriculture. Built on this dataset, we propose AgroNVILA, an MLLM that utilizes a novel Perception-Reasoning Decoupling (PRD) architecture. On the perception side, we incorporate a View-Conditioned Meta-Net (VCMN), which injects macroscopic spatial context into visual tokens, resolving scale ambiguities with minimal computational overhead. On the reasoning side, Agriculture-aware Relative Policy Optimization (ARPO) leverages reinforcement learning to align the model's decision-making with expert agricultural logic, preventing statistical shortcuts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AgroNVILA outperforms state-of-the-art MLLMs, achieving significant improvements (+15.18%) in multi-altitude agricultural reasoning, reflecting its robust capability for holistic agricultural spatial planning.
papers.title_zh: AgroNVILA：多视图农业多模态大语言模型的感知推理解耦
papers.summary_zh: 农业多模态推理需要跨不同尺度的强大空间理解，从地面特写到自上而下的无人机和卫星图像。现有的多模态大语言模型（MLLM）存在明显的“以陆地为中心”的偏差，导致复杂农业规划过程中的尺度混乱和逻辑漂移。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了第一个大规模 AgroOmni (288K)，这是一个多视图训练语料库，旨在捕获现代精准农业中的不同空间拓扑和尺度。在此数据集的基础上，我们提出了 AgroNVILA，这是一种利用新颖的感知推理解耦 (PRD) 架构的 MLLM。在感知方面，我们采用了视图条件元网络（VCMN），它将宏观空间上下文注入视觉标记中，以最小的计算开销解决尺度模糊性。在推理方面，农业感知相对政策优化 (ARPO) 利用强化学习使模型的决策与专家农业逻辑保持一致，防止出现统计捷径。大量实验表明，AgroNVILA 的性能优于最先进的 MLLM，在多海拔农业推理方面取得了显着改进（+15.18%），反映了其强大的整体农业空间规划能力。

papers.title: UAVBench and UAVIT-1M: Benchmarking and Enhancing MLLMs for Low-Altitude UAV Vision-Language Understanding
papers.summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have made significant strides in natural images and satellite remote sensing images. However, understanding low-altitude drone scenarios remains a challenge. Existing datasets primarily focus on a few specific low-altitude visual tasks, which cannot fully assess the ability of MLLMs in real-world low-altitude UAV applications. Therefore, we introduce UAVBench, a comprehensive benchmark, and UAVIT-1M, a large-scale instruction tuning dataset, designed to evaluate and improve MLLMs' abilities in low-altitude vision-language tasks. UAVBench comprises 43 test units and 966k high-quality data samples across 10 tasks at the image-level and region-level. UAVIT-1M consists of approximately 1.24 million diverse instructions, covering 789k multi-scene images and about 2,000 types of spatial resolutions with 11 distinct tasks. UAVBench and UAVIT-1M feature pure real-world visual images and rich weather conditions, and involve manual verification to ensure high quality. Our in-depth analysis of 11 state-of-the-art MLLMs using UAVBench reveals that open-source MLLMs cannot generate accurate conversations about low-altitude visual content, lagging behind closed-source MLLMs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that fine-tuning open-source MLLMs on UAVIT-1M significantly addresses this gap. Our contributions pave the way for bridging the gap between current MLLMs and low-altitude UAV real-world application demands. (Project page: https://UAVBench.github.io/)
papers.title_zh: UAVBench 和 UAVIT-1M：低空无人机视觉语言理解的 MLLM 基准测试和增强
papers.summary_zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在自然图像和卫星遥感图像方面取得了重大进展。然而，了解低空无人机场景仍然是一个挑战。现有数据集主要关注一些特定的低空视觉任务，无法充分评估 MLLM 在现实低空无人机应用中的能力。因此，我们引入了综合基准测试 UAVBench 和大规模指令调优数据集 UAVIT-1M，旨在评估和提高 MLLM 在低空视觉语言任务中的能力。 UAVBench 包含 43 个测试单元和 966k 高质量数据样本，涵盖图像级和区域级的 10 个任务。 UAVIT-1M由约124万条不同指令组成，涵盖789k多场景图像和约2000种空间分辨率以及11种不同的任务。 UAVBench和UAVIT-1M具有纯真实的视觉图像和丰富的天气条件，并涉及人工验证以确保高质量。我们使用 UAVBench 对 11 个最先进的 MLLM 进行了深入分析，结果表明开源 MLLM 无法生成有关低空视觉内容的准确对话，落后于闭源 MLLM。大量实验表明，对 UAVIT-1M 上的开源 MLLM 进行微调可以显着弥补这一差距。我们的贡献为缩小当前 MLLM 与低空无人机实际应用需求之间的差距铺平了道路。 （项目页面：https://UAVBench.github.io/）

papers.title: In-Field 3D Wheat Head Instance Segmentation From TLS Point Clouds Using Deep Learning Without Manual Labels
papers.summary: 3D instance segmentation for laser scanning (LiDAR) point clouds remains a challenge in many remote sensing-related domains. Successful solutions typically rely on supervised deep learning and manual annotations, and consequently focus on objects that can be well delineated through visual inspection and manual labeling of point clouds. However, for tasks with more complex and cluttered scenes, such as in-field plant phenotyping in agriculture, such approaches are often infeasible. In this study, we tackle the task of in-field wheat head instance segmentation directly from terrestrial laser scanning (TLS) point clouds. To address the problem and circumvent the need for manual annotations, we propose a novel two-stage pipeline. To obtain the initial 3D instance proposals, the first stage uses 3D-to-2D multi-view projections, the Grounded SAM pipeline for zero-shot 2D object-centric segmentation, and multi-view label fusion. The second stage uses these initial proposals as noisy pseudo-labels to train a supervised 3D panoptic-style segmentation neural network. Our results demonstrate the feasibility of the proposed approach and show performance improvementsrelative to Wheat3DGS, a recent alternative solution for in-field wheat head instance segmentation without manual 3D annotations based on multi-view RGB images and 3D Gaussian Splatting, showcasing TLS as a competitive sensing alternative. Moreover, the results show that both stages of the proposed pipeline can deliver usable 3D instance segmentation without manual annotations, indicating promising, low-effort transferability to other comparable TLS-based point cloud segmentation tasks.
papers.comment: to be published in ISPRS Annals of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing at XXV ISPRS Congress, Toronto, Canada, July 2026, 8 pages, 5 figures
papers.title_zh: 使用深度学习从 TLS 点云进行现场 3D 小麦头实例分割，无需手动标签
papers.summary_zh: 激光扫描 (LiDAR) 点云的 3D 实例分割仍然是许多遥感相关领域的挑战。成功的解决方案通常依赖于有监督的深度学习和手动注释，因此专注于可以通过目视检查和手动标记点云来很好地描绘的对象。然而，对于场景更加复杂和杂乱的任务，例如农业中的田间植物表型分析，这种方法通常是不可行的。在这项研究中，我们直接从地面激光扫描（TLS）点云解决田间小麦头部实例分割的任务。为了解决这个问题并避免手动注释的需要，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段管道。为了获得初始 3D 实例提案，第一阶段使用 3D 到 2D 多视图投影、用于零样本 2D 以对象为中心的分割的 Grounded SAM 管道以及多视图标签融合。第二阶段使用这些初始建议作为噪声伪标签来训练有监督的 3D 全景式分割神经网络。我们的结果证明了所提出方法的可行性，并显示了相对于 Wheat3DGS 的性能改进，Wheat3DGS 是一种最新的田间小麦头部实例分割替代解决方案，无需基于多视图 RGB 图像和 3D 高斯泼溅的手动 3D 注释，展示了 TLS 作为一种有竞争力的传感替代方案。此外，结果表明，所提出的管道的两个阶段都可以在无需手动注释的情况下提供可用的 3D 实例分割，这表明对其他类似的基于 TLS 的点云分割任务具有良好的、轻松的可转移性。

papers.title: All-day Multi-scenes Lifelong Vision-and-Language Navigation with Tucker Adaptation
papers.summary: Deploying vision-and-language navigation (VLN) agents requires adaptation across diverse scenes and environments, but fine-tuning on a specific scenario often causes catastrophic forgetting in others, which severely limits flexible long-term deployment. We formalize this challenge as the all-day multi-scenes lifelong VLN (AML-VLN) problem. Existing parameter-efficient adapters (e.g., LoRA and its variants) are limited by their two-dimensional matrix form, which fails to capture the multi-hierarchical navigation knowledge spanning multiple scenes and environments. To address this, we propose Tucker Adaptation (TuKA), which represents the multi-hierarchical navigation knowledge as a high-order tensor and leverages Tucker decomposition to decouple the knowledge into shared subspaces and scenario-specific experts. We further introduce a decoupled knowledge incremental learning strategy to consolidate shared subspaces while constraining specific experts for decoupled lifelong learning. Building on TuKA, we also develop a VLN agent named AlldayWalker, which continually learns across multiple navigation scenarios, achieving all-day multi-scenes navigation. Extensive experiments show that AlldayWalker consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.
papers.title_zh: 塔克自适应全天多场景终身视觉和语言导航
papers.summary_zh: 部署视觉和语言导航（VLN）代理需要适应不同的场景和环境，但对特定场景的微调往往会导致其他场景的灾难性遗忘，这严重限制了灵活的长期部署。我们将这一挑战形式化为全天多场景终身 VLN (AML-VLN) 问题。现有的参数高效适配器（例如LoRA及其变体）受到其二维矩阵形式的限制，无法捕获跨越多个场景和环境的多层次导航知识。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了塔克适应（TuKA），它将多层次导航知识表示为高阶张量，并利用塔克分解将知识解耦为共享子空间和特定于场景的专家。我们进一步引入解耦知识增量学习策略来巩固共享子空间，同时限制特定专家进行解耦终身学习。在TuKA的基础上，我们还开发了名为AlldayWalker的VLN智能体，它能够在多个导航场景中不断学习，实现全天多场景导航。大量实验表明，AlldayWalker 的性能始终优于最先进的基线。

papers.title: Learning in Function Spaces: An Unified Functional Analytic View of Supervised and Unsupervised Learning
papers.summary: Many machine learning algorithms can be interpreted as procedures for estimating functions defined on the data distribution. In this paper we present a conceptual framework that formulates a wide range of learning problems as variational optimization over function spaces induced by the data distribution. Within this framework the data distribution defines operators that capture structural properties of the data, such as similarity relations or statistical dependencies. Learning algorithms can then be viewed as estimating functions expressed in bases determined by these operators. This perspective provides a unified way to interpret several learning paradigms. In supervised learning the objective functional is defined using labeled data and typically corresponds to minimizing prediction risk, whereas unsupervised learning relies on structural properties of the input distribution and leads to objectives based on similarity or smoothness constraints. From this viewpoint, the distinction between learning paradigms arises primarily from the choice of the functional being optimized rather than from the underlying function space. We illustrate this framework by discussing connections with kernel methods, spectral clustering, and manifold learning, highlighting how operators induced by data distributions naturally define function representations used by learning algorithms. The goal of this work is not to introduce a new algorithm but to provide a conceptual framework that clarifies the role of function spaces and operators in modern machine learning.
papers.title_zh: 函数空间中的学习：监督和无监督学习的统一函数分析视图
papers.summary_zh: 许多机器学习算法可以解释为估计数据分布上定义的函数的过程。在本文中，我们提出了一个概念框架，它将广泛的学习问题表述为数据分布引起的函数空间的变分优化。在此框架内，数据分布定义了捕获数据结构属性的运算符，例如相似关系或统计依赖性。然后，学习算法可以被视为以这些算子确定的基数表示的估计函数。这种观点提供了解释多种学习范式的统一方法。在监督学习中，目标函数是使用标记数据定义的，通常对应于最小化预测风险，而无监督学习依赖于输入分布的结构特性，并导致基于相似性或平滑度约束的目标。从这个角度来看，学习范式之间的区别主要源于被优化函数的选择，而不是底层函数空间。我们通过讨论与核方法、谱聚类和流形学习的联系来说明这个框架，强调由数据分布引起的算子如何自然地定义学习算法使用的函数表示。这项工作的目标不是引入新算法，而是提供一个概念框架，阐明函数空间和算子在现代机器学习中的作用。

papers.title: ZOTTA: Test-Time Adaptation with Gradient-Free Zeroth-Order Optimization
papers.summary: Test-time adaptation (TTA) aims to improve model robustness under distribution shifts by adapting to unlabeled test data, but most existing methods rely on backpropagation (BP), which is computationally costly and incompatible with non-differentiable models such as quantized models, limiting practical deployment on numerous edge devices. Recent BP-free approaches alleviate overhead but remain either architecture-specific or limited in optimization capacity to handle high-dimensional models. We propose ZOTTA, a fully BP-free TTA framework that performs efficient adaptation using only forward passes via Zeroth-Order Optimization (ZOO). While ZOO is theoretically appealing, naive application leads to slow convergence under high-dimensional parameter spaces and unstable optimization due to the lack of labels. ZOTTA overcomes these challenges through 1) Distribution-Robust Layer Selection, which automatically identifies and freezes layers that already extract distribution-invariant features, updating only domain-sensitive layers to reduce the optimization dimensionality and accelerate convergence; 2) Spatial Feature Aggregation Alignment, which stabilizes ZOO by aligning globally aggregated spatial features between source and target to reduce gradient variance. Together, these components enable architecture-agnostic and stable BP-free adaptation. Extensive experiments on ImageNet-C/R/Sketch/A show that ZOTTA outperforms or matches BP-based methods, e.g., it reduces memory usage by 84% and improves accuracy by 3.9% over SAR on ImageNet-C.
papers.title_zh: ZOTTA：具有无梯度零阶优化的测试时适应
papers.summary_zh: 测试时间适应（TTA）旨在通过适应未标记的测试数据来提高分布变化下的模型鲁棒性，但大多数现有方法依赖于反向传播（BP），其计算成本高昂且与不可微分模型（例如量化模型）不兼容，限制了在众多边缘设备上的实际部署。最近的无 BP 方法减轻了开销，但仍然是特定于体系结构的，或者处理高维模型的优化能力有限。我们提出了 ZOTTA，这是一个完全无 BP 的 TTA 框架，它仅通过零阶优化（ZOO）使用前向传递来执行有效的自适应。虽然 ZOO 在理论上很有吸引力，但幼稚的应用会导致高维参数空间下收敛缓慢，并且由于缺乏标签而导致优化不稳定。 ZOTTA通过1）分布稳健层选择来克服这些挑战，它自动识别并冻结已经提取分布不变特征的层，仅更新域敏感层以降低优化维度并加速收敛； 2) 空间特征聚合对齐，通过对齐源和目标之间全局聚合的空间特征来稳定 ZOO，以减少梯度方差。这些组件共同实现了与架构无关且稳定的无 BP 适应。在 ImageNet-C/R/Sketch/A 上的大量实验表明，ZOTTA 优于或匹配基于 BP 的方法，例如，与 ImageNet-C 上的 SAR 相比，它减少了 84% 的内存使用量，并将准确性提高了 3.9%。

papers.title: Not All Directions Matter: Towards Structured and Task-Aware Low-Rank Model Adaptation
papers.summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become a cornerstone of parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT). Yet, its efficacy is hampered by two fundamental limitations: semantic drift, by treating all update directions with equal importance, and structural incoherence, from adapting layers independently, resulting in suboptimal, uncoordinated updates. To remedy these, we propose StructLoRA, a framework that addresses both limitations through a principled, dual-component design: (1) an Information Bottleneck-guided filter that prunes task-irrelevant directions to mitigate semantic drift, and (2) a lightweight, training-only graph-based coordinator that enforces inter-layer consistency to resolve structural incoherence. Extensive experiments across large language model , vision language model, and vision model (including LLaMA, LLaVA, and ViT) demonstrate that StructLoRA consistently establishes a new state-of-the-art, outperforming not only vanilla LoRA but also advanced dynamic rank allocation and sparsity-based methods. Notably, the benefits are particularly pronounced in challenging low-rank and low-data regimes. Crucially, since our proposed modules operate only during training, StructLoRA enhances performance with zero additional inference cost, advancing the focus of PEFT -- from mere parameter compression to a more holistic optimization of information quality and structural integrity.
papers.title_zh: 并非所有方向都很重要：走向结构化和任务感知的低阶模型适应
papers.summary_zh: 低秩适应（LoRA）已成为参数高效微调（PEFT）的基石。然而，它的功效受到两个基本限制的阻碍：语义漂移（通过同等重要地对待所有更新方向）和结构不连贯（独立适应层），导致次优、不协调的更新。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 StructLoRA，这是一个通过有原则的双组件设计解决这两个限制的框架：（1）一个信息瓶颈引导过滤器，它修剪与任务无关的方向以减轻语义漂移，以及（2）一个轻量级的、仅训练的基于图的协调器，它强制层间一致性以解决结构不连贯的问题。大型语言模型、视觉语言模型和视觉模型（包括 LLaMA、LLaVA 和 ViT）的广泛实验表明，StructLoRA 始终如一地建立了一种新的最先进的技术，不仅优于普通 LoRA，而且优于先进的动态排名分配和基于稀疏性的方法。值得注意的是，在挑战低排名和低数据制度时，其好处尤其明显。至关重要的是，由于我们提出的模块仅在训练期间运行，StructLoRA 以零额外推理成本提高了性能，从而推进了 PEFT 的重点——从单纯的参数压缩到信息质量和结构完整性的更全面的优化。

papers.title: Membership Inference for Contrastive Pre-training Models with Text-only PII Queries
papers.summary: Contrastive pretraining models such as CLIP and CLAP, serve as the ubiquitous perceptual backbones for modern multimodal large models, yet their reliance on web-scale data raises growing concerns about memorizing Personally Identifiable Information (PII). Auditing such models via membership inference is challenging in practice: shadow-model MIAs are computationally prohibitive for large multimodal backbones, and existing multimodal auditing methods typically require querying the target with paired biometric inputs, thereby directly exposing sensitive biometric information to the target model. To bypass this critical limitation, we demonstrate a highly desirable capability for privacy auditing: multimodal memorization within these foundational encoders can be accurately inferred using exclusively the text modality. We propose Unimodal Membership Inference Detector (UMID), a text-only auditing framework that performs text-guided cross-modal latent inversion and extracts two complementary signals, similarity (alignment to the queried text) and variability (consistency across randomized inversions). UMID compares these statistics to a lightweight non-member reference constructed from synthetic gibberish and makes decisions via an ensemble of unsupervised anomaly detectors. Comprehensive experiments across diverse CLIP and CLAP architectures demonstrate that UMID significantly improves the effectiveness and efficiency over prior MIAs, delivering strong detection performance with sub-second auditing cost using solely text queries, completely circumventing the need for biometric inputs and complying with strict privacy constraints.
papers.title_zh: 具有纯文本 PII 查询的对比预训练模型的成员资格推断
papers.summary_zh: CLIP 和 CLAP 等对比预训练模型是现代多模态大型模型普遍存在的感知支柱，但它们对网络规模数据的依赖引起了人们对记忆个人身份信息 (PII) 的日益关注。通过成员推断来审计此类模型在实践中具有挑战性：影子模型 MIA 对于大型多模态骨干网来说在计算上是令人望而却步的，而现有的多模态审计方法通常需要使用成对的生物特征输入查询目标，从而直接将敏感的生物特征信息暴露给目标模型。为了绕过这一关键限制，我们展示了一种非常理想的隐私审计功能：可以仅使用文本模态来准确推断这些基础编码器中的多模态记忆。我们提出了单模态成员推理检测器（UMID），这是一种纯文本审核框架，它执行文本引导的跨模态潜在反转并提取两个互补信号：相似性（与查询文本的对齐）和可变性（随机反转之间的一致性）。 UMID 将这些统计数据与由合成乱码构建的轻量级非成员参考进行比较，并通过一组无监督的异常检测器做出决策。跨不同 CLIP 和 CLAP 架构的综合实验表明，UMID 比之前的 MIA 显着提高了有效性和效率，仅使用文本查询即可以亚秒级审计成本提供强大的检测性能，完全规避对生物识别输入的需求并遵守严格的隐私约束。

papers.title: Setting-Matched and Semantics-Scaled Benchmarking of One-Step Generative Models Against Multistep Diffusion and Flow Models
papers.summary: State-of-the-art text-to-image models produce high-quality images, but inference remains expensive as generation requires several sequential ODE or denoising steps. Native one-step models aim to reduce this cost by mapping noise to an image in a single step, yet fair comparisons to multi-step systems are difficult because studies use mismatched sampling steps and different classifier-free guidance (CFG) settings, where CFG can shift FID, Inception Score, and CLIP-based alignment in opposing directions. It is also unclear how well one-step models scale to multi-step inference, and there is limited standardized out-of-distribution evaluation for label-ID-conditioned generators beyond ImageNet. To address this, we benchmark eight models spanning one-step flows (MeanFlow, Improved MeanFlow, SoFlow), multi-step baselines (RAE, Scale-RAE), and established systems (SiT, Stable Diffusion 3.5, FLUX.1) under a class-conditional protocol on ImageNet validation, ImageNetV2, and reLAIONet, our new proofread out-of-distribution dataset aligned to ImageNet label IDs. Using FID, Inception Score, CLIP Score, and Pick Score, we show that FID-focused model development and CFG selection can be misleading in few-step regimes, where guidance changes can improve FID while degrading text-image alignment and human preference signals, worsening visual quality. To make these tradeoffs explicit, we introduce CLIP-scaled and PickScore-scaled variants of FID (csFID, psFID) and Inception Score (csIS, psIS) to serve as a diagnostic for semantically aligned image generation.
papers.title_zh: 一步生成模型与多步扩散和流模型的设置匹配和语义尺度基准测试
papers.summary_zh: 最先进的文本到图像模型可以生成高质量的图像，但推理仍然很昂贵，因为生成需要几个连续的 ODE 或去噪步骤。原生单步模型旨在通过一步将噪声映射到图像来降低这一成本，但与多步系统进行公平比较很困难，因为研究使用不匹配的采样步骤和不同的无分类器指导 (CFG) 设置，其中 CFG 可以向相反方向移动 FID、初始分数和基于 CLIP 的对齐。目前还不清楚单步模型扩展到多步推理的效果如何，而且对于 ImageNet 之外的标签 ID 条件生成器，标准化的分布外评估也很有限。为了解决这个问题，我们对跨一步流（MeanFlow、Improved MeanFlow、SoFlow）、多步基线（RAE、Scale-RAE）的八个模型进行了基准测试，并在 ImageNet 验证、ImageNetV2 和 reLAIONet（我们新校对的与 ImageNet 标签 ID 对齐的分布外数据集）上的类条件协议下建立了系统（SiT、Stable Diffusion 3.5、FLUX.1）。使用 FID、Inception Score、CLIP Score 和 Pick Score，我们表明，以 FID 为中心的模型开发和 CFG 选择在几个步骤的情况下可能会产生误导，其中指导更改可以改善 FID，同时降低文本图像对齐和人类偏好信号，从而恶化视觉质量。为了使这些权衡更加明确，我们引入了 FID（csFID、psFID）和 Inception Score（csIS、psIS）的 CLIP 缩放和 PickScore 缩放变体，以作为语义对齐图像生成的诊断。

papers.title: Balancing Multimodal Domain Generalization via Gradient Modulation and Projection
papers.summary: Multimodal Domain Generalization (MMDG) leverages the complementary strengths of multiple modalities to enhance model generalization on unseen domains. A central challenge in multimodal learning is optimization imbalance, where modalities converge at different speeds during training. This imbalance leads to unequal gradient contributions, allowing some modalities to dominate the learning process while others lag behind. Existing balancing strategies typically regulate each modality's gradient contribution based on its classification performance on the source domain to alleviate this issue. However, relying solely on source-domain accuracy neglects a key insight in MMDG: modalities that excel on the source domain may generalize poorly to unseen domains, limiting cross-domain gains. To overcome this limitation, we propose Gradient Modulation Projection (GMP), a unified strategy that promotes balanced optimization in MMDG. GMP first decouples gradients associated with classification and domain-invariance objectives. It then modulates each modality's gradient based on semantic and domain confidence. Moreover, GMP dynamically adjusts gradient projections by tracking the relative strength of each task, mitigating conflicts between classification and domain-invariant learning within modality-specific encoders. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GMP achieves state-of-the-art performance and integrates flexibly with diverse MMDG methods, significantly improving generalization across multiple benchmarks.
papers.title_zh: 通过梯度调制和投影平衡多模态域泛化
papers.summary_zh: 多模态域泛化（MMDG）利用多种模态的互补优势来增强未知领域的模型泛化。多模态学习的一个核心挑战是优化不平衡，即训练过程中模态以不同的速度收敛。这种不平衡导致梯度贡献不均，使得某些模式主导学习过程，而另一些模式则落后。现有的平衡策略通常根据源域上的分类性能来调节每种模态的梯度贡献，以缓解这个问题。然而，仅仅依赖源域准确性忽略了 MMDG 的一个关键见解：在源域上表现出色的模式可能很难推广到未见过的域，从而限制了跨域增益。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了梯度调制投影（GMP），这是一种促进 MMDG 平衡优化的统一策略。 GMP 首先解耦与分类和域不变目标相关的梯度。然后，它根据语义和领域置信度调整每种模态的梯度。此外，GMP 通过跟踪每个任务的相对强度来动态调整梯度投影，减轻特定模态编码器内分类和域不变学习之间的冲突。大量实验表明，GMP 实现了最先进的性能，并与多种 MMDG 方法灵活集成，显着提高了跨多个基准的泛化能力。

papers.title: TACTIC for Navigating the Unknown: Tabular Anomaly deteCTion via In-Context inference
papers.summary: Anomaly detection for tabular data has been a long-standing unsupervised learning problem that remains a major challenge for current deep learning models. Recently, in-context learning has emerged as a new paradigm that has shifted efforts from task-specific optimization to large-scale pretraining aimed at creating foundation models that generalize across diverse datasets. Although in-context models, such as TabPFN, perform well in supervised problems, their learned classification-based priors may not readily extend to anomaly detection. In this paper, we study in-context models for anomaly detection and show that the unsupervised extensions to TabPFN exhibit unstable behavior, particularly in noisy or contaminated contexts, in addition to the high computational cost. We address these challenges and introduce TACTIC, an in-context anomaly detection approach based on pretraining with anomaly-centric synthetic priors, which provides fast and data-dependent reasoning about anomalies while avoiding dataset-specific tuning. In contrast to typical score-based approaches, which produce uncalibrated anomaly scores that require post-processing (e.g. threshold selection or ranking heuristics), the proposed model is trained as a discriminative predictor, enabling unambiguous anomaly decisions in a single forward pass. Through experiments on real-world datasets, we examine the performance of TACTIC in clean and noisy contexts with varying anomaly rates and different anomaly types, as well as the impact of prior choices on detection quality. Our experiments clearly show that specialized anomaly-centric in-context models such as TACTIC are highly competitive compared to other task-specific methods.
papers.title_zh: 探索未知的策略：通过上下文推理进行表格异常检测
papers.summary_zh: 表格数据的异常检测一直是一个长期存在的无监督学习问题，仍然是当前深度学习模型的主要挑战。最近，上下文学习已经成为一种新的范式，它将工作从特定于任务的优化转向大规模预训练，旨在创建跨不同数据集泛化的基础模型。尽管上下文模型（例如 TabPFN）在监督问题中表现良好，但它们学习到的基于分类的先验可能不容易扩展到异常检测。在本文中，我们研究了用于异常检测的上下文模型，并表明除了高计算成本之外，TabPFN 的无监督扩展表现出不稳定的行为，特别是在噪声或污染的上下文中。我们应对这些挑战并引入 TACTIC，这是一种基于以异常为中心的合成先验进行预训练的上下文异常检测方法，它提供了有关异常的快速且依赖于数据的推理，同时避免了特定于数据集的调整。与典型的基于分数的方法相比，该方法会产生需要后处理（例如阈值选择或排名启发式）的未校准异常分数，所提出的模型被训练为判别性预测器，从而在单次前向传递中实现明确的异常决策。通过对真实世界数据集的实验，我们检查了 TACTIC 在干净和嘈杂环境中具有不同异常率和不同异常类型的性能，以及先前选择对检测质量的影响。我们的实验清楚地表明，与其他特定于任务的方法相比，专门的以异常为中心的上下文模型（例如 TACTIC）具有很强的竞争力。
